# Teske Systemtechnik

> Freelance Python automation, API development, and custom software engineering business based in Melle, Germany. Operated by Jan Teske. Specializes in workflow automation, data pipelines, web scraping, API development (FastAPI/Flask), and reverse engineering. Clients worldwide. Trilingual service: German (native), English (fluent), Russian.

## Core pages

- [Homepage (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/): Primary business landing page in German; selected projects, fixed-price services and verified 5-star client reviews (Upwork, Google)
- [Homepage (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/): Primary business landing page in English; selected projects, fixed-price services and verified 5-star client reviews (Upwork, Google)
- [Homepage (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/): Primary business landing page in Russian; selected projects, fixed-price services and verified 5-star client reviews (Upwork, Google)
- [Project catalog (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/): List of selected project case studies
- [Project catalog (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/): List of selected project case studies
- [Project catalog (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/): List of selected project case studies
- [About (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/about/): Company / about page: owner-led studio for automation and custom software, founded November 2025, small team, 25+ delivered projects
- [About (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/about/): Same about page in English
- [About (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/about/): Same about page in Russian

## Case studies

- [AWS Cost Optimization (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/aws-cost-optimization/): 65% AWS cost reduction ($3,850 → $1,330 / month) via safe legacy decommissioning with zero downtime — log-driven cleanup of zombie ALBs, EKS shutdown, storage lifecycle migration to Glacier. Client: Blender Networks Inc. (advertising agency, Bedford, Canada). Tech: AWS (EC2, ALB, EKS, S3, RDS, VPC), CloudWatch, Cost Explorer, FinOps.
- [AWS Cost Optimization (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/aws-cost-optimization/): Same case study in English.
- [AWS Cost Optimization (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/aws-cost-optimization/): Same case study in Russian.
- [Legacy-DB Reverse Engineering & Migration (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/legacy-data-extraction/): 1.47 million parts liberated from a 1.2 GB password-protected MS Access manufacturer database and migrated into the client's new system — including 82,076 DjVu drawings converted to JPG, validated against a 5-rule strict-mode contract with zero rule violations, fully auditable. Client: After-market construction equipment dealer (anonymized under NDA). Tech: Python, pyodbc, MS Access, SQLite, DjVuLibre, PyMuPDF, ThreadPoolExecutor, ETL.
- [Legacy-DB Reverse Engineering & Migration (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/legacy-data-extraction/): Same case study in English.
- [Legacy-DB Reverse Engineering & Migration (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/legacy-data-extraction/): Same case study in Russian.
- [Book Lister AI (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/book-lister-ai/): Windows desktop app that scans used books in under 30 seconds — ArUco-calibrated webcam measures dimensions + scans barcode, Gemini 2.5 Vision extracts title/author/publisher/year, Google Books + eBay Browse API set competitive pricing, eBay Trading API publishes the listing. 400% throughput boost for a used-bookstore. Tech: Python 3.11, OpenCV, customtkinter, Google Vertex AI (Gemini 2.5), eBay APIs, SQLite. ~6,450 LOC production + 260+ pytest tests.
- [Book Lister AI (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/book-lister-ai/): Same case study in English.
- [Book Lister AI (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/book-lister-ai/): Same case study in Russian.
- [Microsoft Shopping Feed Pipeline (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/microsoft-shopping-feed/): Fully automated daily sync of large affiliate feeds (Connexity, Shopping24) into Microsoft Merchant Center — fail-safe, 100% compliant, zero-error monitoring to protect ad-revenue ROI. Client: Blender Networks Inc. Tech: Python, Pandas, ETL pipelines, complex XML/CSV/JSON parsing, Microsoft Merchant Center feed specifications.
- [Microsoft Shopping Feed Pipeline (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/microsoft-shopping-feed/): Same case study in English.
- [Microsoft Shopping Feed Pipeline (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/microsoft-shopping-feed/): Same case study in Russian.
- [Multi-Process Browser-Automation Framework (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/browser-automation-framework/): 17,461 LOC Python framework for parallel, fault-tolerant browser-automation workflows on Windows. Three decoupled layers (Streamlit UI / Scheduler+CLI orchestrator / browser-worker subprocesses), cross-layer IPC exclusively through SQLite (WAL + BEGIN IMMEDIATE) and atomically written JSON. Highlights: race-safe multi-worker coordination via asyncio.Lock round-robin, cross-process crash-file bridge with sys.excepthook last-line-of-defence (no crash gets lost even on early subprocess death), per-phase asyncio.timeout() blocks with live phase tracking, typed exception hierarchy with swarm deduplication, CDP-based auth via Fetch.authRequired (no Manifest V2 extension needed), Windows Job Object hard-cleanup of subprocess tree on Streamlit exit, 9 pytest test suites with GitHub Actions CI on every push. Client: private. Tech: Python 3.11+, asyncio, Playwright, Chrome DevTools Protocol, SQLite (WAL), Streamlit, Telegram Bot API, pytest, GitHub Actions, Windows Job Objects.
- [Multi-Process Browser-Automation Framework (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/browser-automation-framework/): Same case study in English.
- [Multi-Process Browser-Automation Framework (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/browser-automation-framework/): Same case study in Russian.
- [Math Engine (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/projekte/math-engine/): From-scratch, eval()-free expression interpreter for Python, published open-source as the `math-engine` package on PyPI (v0.6.6). Closed Input → Tokenizer → Recursive-Descent-Parser (10-level precedence) → AST → Evaluator / linear-equation solver → typed Output pipeline; never calls eval/exec/compile. Exact decimal.Decimal arithmetic with adaptive precision (100–10,000 digits, 20,000-digit cap), so 0.1 + 0.2 is exactly 0.3. Character-precise diagnostics: 78 four-digit error codes in nine families, typed MathError hierarchy. Symbolic linear-equation solving plus a programmer's-calculator mode (8/16/32/64-bit word size, two's complement, bitwise ops). ~4,200 LOC production + ~2,400 LOC tests, 399 pytest tests, 90% coverage, GitHub Actions CI across Python 3.8–3.12. Open-source in-house build (no client), MIT license. GitHub: https://github.com/JanTeske06/math_engine
- [Math Engine (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/projects/math-engine/): Same case study in English.
- [Math Engine (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/proekty/math-engine/): Same case study in Russian.

## Service / pricing pages

Fixed-price service packages with starting prices. Every service links to its inquiry form on the home page (`?service=<slug>&min=<eur>#contact`) which pre-fills the project dropdown and budget. The home-page contact form replaces the standalone inquiry pages.

### Service overview

- [Leistungen (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/): All seven fixed-price services with starting prices, sorted cheapest-first.
- [Services (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/): Same overview in English.
- [Услуги (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/): Same overview in Russian.

### Discovery Call & Architecture Consultation (paid, from €75)

- [Discovery-Call (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/discovery-call/): 30-minute (€75) or 60-minute (€150) consultation. Workflow analysis, feasibility check, architecture recommendation. Written summary + cost estimate within 24h. Call price credited against any follow-up project.
- [Discovery Call (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/discovery-call/): Same service in English.
- [Discovery-звонок (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/discovery-call/): Same service in Russian.

### Codebase Review & Audit (from €1,200)

- [Codebase-Review (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/codebase-review/): Fixed-price external review of an existing codebase (architecture, code quality, security, performance, test coverage) with a prioritised, actionable report. Includes an interactive price calculator (size, depth, speed, stack).
- [Codebase Review (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/codebase-review/): Same service in English.
- [Codebase Review (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/codebase-review/): Same service in Russian.

### AWS Cost Analysis & Reduction (from €3,500)

- [AWS Kostenanalyse (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/aws-kostenanalyse/): Fixed-price AWS bill audit with prioritised action list. Three columns: quick wins (days), structural fixes (weeks), architecture (months). Dependency map from logs enables zero-downtime decommissioning. Backed by the Blender Networks case (3,850 USD → 1,330 USD / month).
- [AWS Cost Analysis (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/aws-cost-analysis/): Same service in English.
- [AWS Cost Analysis (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/aws-cost-analysis/): Same service in Russian.

### Product Feed Pipelines (from €3,500)

- [Product-Feed-Pipelines (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/product-feed-pipelines/): Automated daily sync of large affiliate feeds (Connexity, Shopping24) into Merchant Centers. Spec compliance, monitoring, quarantine, recovery logic. Backed by the Microsoft Shopping Feed case.
- [Product Feed Pipelines (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/product-feed-pipelines/): Same service in English.
- [Pipeline для product-feed (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/product-feed-pipelines/): Same service in Russian.

### Legacy Data Migration & Reverse Engineering (from €4,500)

- [Legacy-Datenmigration (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/legacy-datenmigration/): Extraction and migration from old or undocumented databases (Access, dBase, Foxpro, etc.). Strict-mode rule validation, per-record audit trail, dry-run before real migration. Backed by the 1.47M parts case (password-protected 1.2 GB Access DB).
- [Legacy Data Migration (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/legacy-data-migration/): Same service in English.
- [Миграция legacy-данных (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/legacy-data-migration/): Same service in Russian.

### Browser Automation at Production Level (from €6,500)

- [Browser-Automation (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/browser-automation/): Production-grade browser automation framework adaptation. Multi-worker, crash recovery, CDP-based auth without Manifest V2, race-safe async coordination. Backed by the 17,461 LOC private framework.
- [Browser Automation (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/browser-automation/): Same service in English.
- [Browser-automation (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/browser-automation/): Same service in Russian.

### Custom AI Desktop App (from €8,500)

- [Custom AI Desktop App (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/leistungen/custom-ai-app/): Bespoke Windows app with AI backend (Gemini, Claude, GPT or local), hardware integration (camera, scanner, USB) and API pipelines. Vertical-slice prototype in two weeks, full app with installer, pytest coverage, code docs. Backed by the Book Lister AI case (30 seconds per book instead of 10 minutes).
- [Custom AI Desktop App (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/services/custom-ai-app/): Same service in English.
- [Custom AI Desktop App (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/uslugi/custom-ai-app/): Same service in Russian.

## Booking / appointments

Paid online consultation booking, self-built (Google Calendar + Stripe Checkout); a Google Meet link is created on payment. 30 minutes (€75) or 60 minutes (€150), prices incl. German VAT. Mon to Fri, Europe/Berlin timezone.

- [Beratungstermin buchen (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/termin/): Book a paid online consultation
- [Book a call (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/booking/): Same booking page in English
- [Запись (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/zapis/): Same booking page in Russian

## Legal

- [Impressum (German)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/de/impressum/): Legal notice per § 5 TMG (legally binding)
- [Legal Notice (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/legal-notice/): English convenience translation
- [Выходные данные (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/impressum/): Russian convenience translation

- [Privacy Policy (English)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/en/privacy-policy/): English convenience translation
- [Политика конфиденциальности (Russian)](https://teske-systemtechnik.de/ru/privacy/): Russian convenience translation

## Key facts

- Business name: Teske Systemtechnik
- Legal form: Einzelunternehmen (sole proprietorship), Inhaber Jan Teske
- Location: Melle, Niedersachsen, Germany
- Address: Elschers Kamp 13, 49324 Melle, Germany
- VAT ID: DE459634758
- Email: jt@teske-systemtechnik.de
- Phone: +49 1522 5166058
- Service area: Worldwide, remote-first
- Languages: German (native), English (fluent), Russian
- GitHub: https://github.com/JanTeske06
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/user/JanTeske06/
- Upwork: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~015b43fa57ecfc1b1c

## Services

- Python automation: Web scraping, workflow automation, cronjob systems, data extraction
- API development: FastAPI, Flask, REST, GraphQL — clean, typed, tested, documented
- Data pipelines: CSV/unstructured → structured, queryable databases (PostgreSQL, SQLite)
- Custom tools: CLI utilities, desktop applications, internal dashboards
- Reverse engineering: Network tracing, API reconstruction, legacy system recovery
- Cloud cost optimization (FinOps): AWS audits, legacy decommissioning, right-sizing, storage lifecycle — measurable cost reduction with zero production impact

## Technology stack

Python, FastAPI, Flask, Django, SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite), Selenium, mitmproxy, Wireshark, Docker, Git. General preference for clean, typed, tested code over clever one-liners.

## Contact preference

Email first (jt@teske-systemtechnik.de) for initial project inquiries. Phone (+49 1522 5166058) for urgent matters. Typical response time: within one business day.
